# Burger & Baguette

Burger & Baguette is a German foodtruck concept for premium smash burgers, gourmet baguettes, branded packaging, and launch planning.

## Public Pages

- [Home](https://burger-baguette.de/) - Concept, menu, brand system, operating model, and business plan overview.
- [Brand Identity](https://burger-baguette.de/brand) - Logo system, colors, typography, packaging mockups, and signature templates.
- [Sitemap](https://burger-baguette.de/sitemap.xml) - XML sitemap for public crawlable pages.

## Crawl Guidance

Public marketing and brand pages may be indexed. Private intranet and operations pages should not be indexed.
